mapper.select: SELECT t.topic_id, t.name, t.readable_alias as alias, t.description, am.name as min_access_level, t.created_at FROM notification_topic t JOIN access_mode am on t.min_access_level = am.access_level

SELECT t.topic_id, t.name, t.readable_alias as alias, t.description, am.name as min_access_level, t.created_at FROM notification_topic t JOIN access_mode am on t.min_access_level = am.access_level WHERE t.name = #{topicKey} or t.readable_alias = #{topicKey}
